title: Pael's Tooth
description: Upon pickup, remove [blue]5[/blue] cards from your [gold]Deck[/gold]. After each combat, randomly add [blue]1[/blue] back [gold]Upgraded[/gold]. Shows cards currently in the pot when available.
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: Removes 5 upgradable cards from your deck upon pickup. After each combat, a random card from the pot is restored and upgraded. Relic is disabled when no cards remain in the pot. The counter displays the number of cards in the pot.
